# HighStreet

> HighStreet is an invitation-only private members club based in Seoul, South Korea, connecting founders, entrepreneurs, investors, creators and global tastemakers through curated experiences, meetings, courses and expert services.

## About
HighStreet (하스) exists to compound human growth for a small circle of ambitious operators. The society blends High Vision (long-term thinking, taste, capital) with Street Wisdom (execution, hustle, real-world instinct).

## Who it is for
- Founders and operators building category-defining companies
- Entrepreneurs, investors and family-office principals
- Creators, artists and cultural tastemakers
- Global executives with a base or interest in Seoul and East Asia

## Where it operates
- Home base: Seoul, South Korea
- Chapters and gatherings extend across Asia and select global cities

## What members receive
- Private in-person meetings, dinners and off-record salons
- Curated courses on business, capital, taste and lifestyle
- Access to vetted expert services (legal, financial, creative, growth)
- Limited-run luxury accessories and artifacts reserved for members
- A trusted peer network of vetted operators

## Why it exists
The club exists to counter the loneliness of ambition — a private room where operators can trade real information, capital and taste without performance.

## Access
Membership is invitation-only. To request access: access@highstreet.co.kr
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/highstreet_kr

## Canonical
- Website: https://highstreet.co.kr
- Sitemap: https://highstreet.co.kr/sitemap.xml
